program.provenancePolicy: Each ruleset group tracks human review date, fixtures, and provenance references in this manifest so metadata.json can be audited without opening the source lists.

groups.description: Ad network and ad delivery hosts curated for CalmBlock MVP.

provenance.label: CalmBlock manual curation
provenance.notes: Release-bound host list kept intentionally small and DNR-safe.

provenance.label: EasyList reference review
provenance.notes: Used as research input only; entries are manually rewritten into CalmBlock format.

groups.description: Common analytics and tracking domains with cross-site behavior.

provenance.label: CalmBlock manual curation
provenance.notes: Entries are scoped to high-signal tracker endpoints with low breakage expectations.

provenance.label: EasyPrivacy reference review
provenance.notes: Used as a provenance anchor for tracker-domain research, not as an auto-import feed.

groups.description: Known popup, push prompt, and consent management nuisance endpoints.

provenance.label: CalmBlock manual curation
provenance.notes: Consent and push-notification endpoints are manually reviewed for low-risk blocking.

provenance.label: Fanboy annoyances reference review
provenance.notes: Used as research material when validating nuisance endpoint categories.

groups.description: Higher-friction strict privacy endpoints that may affect site compatibility.

provenance.label: CalmBlock manual curation
provenance.notes: Strict rules are reserved for higher-friction endpoints and reviewed for breakage risk.

provenance.label: Compatibility review queue
provenance.notes: Strict entries stay tied to reproducible breakage review and fixture follow-up.
